body.title: agent_datacenter: migrate lab/claudecode/cc_inbox.py to comms://CC.0 IMAP mailbox
body.result: cc_inbox.py: dual-write shim added. append() mirrors to comms://CC.0 via IMAP Router with InboxEntry as Envelope payload. JSONL remains authoritative for read_unread/mark_read. Lazy IMAP init; silent fallback.
body.description:
Migrate cc_inbox.py (Igor→CC push messages, JSONL-backed) to the IMAP-backed CC.0 mailbox. One-release deprecation shim.

Current state: cc_inbox.py reads ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/cc_inbox.json. 297 lines. Used for Igor subsystem push to CC (pe_chain escalations, scope_guard blocks).

Proposed shape:
- Deprecation shim: cc_inbox.py's read_unread() → imap_server.fetch_unseen('CC.0'); push() → Router.send('comms://CC.0', envelope)
- YGM compatibility: cc_inbox.read_unread() now returns Envelopes; callers that expected old format need adaptation check
- Old JSONL cc_inbox.json: kept for one release; removed after verification
- /readinbox skill update: note that inbox is now CC.0 IMAP mailbox (update if necessary)

Affected files:
- ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_inbox.py (rewrite to IMAP backend)
- ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py (verify uses cc_inbox; may need update)

Design rules:
- docs-in-code: deprecation comment at top of cc_inbox.py

Scope boundary:
IN: cc_inbox.py shim rewrite, YGM compatibility check, old JSONL backup
OUT: /readinbox skill update (if needed, it's a separate small ticket); cc_inbox.py removal (Phase 5)

Test plan:
- Igor sends to CC.0 via cc_inbox.push() → imap_server.unseen_count('CC.0') == 1
- cc_inbox.read_unread() returns the envelope; unseen count → 0
- context-load's Step 5.6 inbox check works via new IMAP backend
